name: Private App Parallel Assessment
target_surface: local generated static apps plus deterministic cognitive evidence artifacts

framework_stack.role: keep owner intent, proof boundaries, and future handoff coherent
model private-domain actors, constraints, values, functions, and observable signals before building
route authority, privacy, marketing exclusion, and local-proof decisions deterministically
record contested product-shape options and why local static proof wins for this slice
commit the local private-first app proof choice and preserve consequences
make intent, profile selection, action intent, app generation, and result events inspectable

hard_gates: all generated apps must keep external actions disabled
marketing must be excluded from this evaluation slice
sample private-domain records must be synthetic
each app must include all cognitive framework artifacts
each app must have reviewable local source and assessment report
claims must stay bounded to local deterministic fixture behavior
non_claims: not Telegram or deployed gateway proof
not marketing, analytics, payment, or real-user traction proof
not proof over real private customer data
